title: Custom Role Definitions
description: Competition-level definitions for custom staff roles that may not be part of the base WCIF specification.

roles.description: Custom role definitions configured for this competition.

id.description: Unique role identifier stored in WCIF.

exportStrategy.description: Where to persist role assignments when saving WCIF.

showOnStaffPage.description: Whether this role appears as a toggle column on the Staff page.

assignPerGroup.description: Whether this role can be assigned per-group in Configure Assignments.

assignmentKey.description: Keyboard shortcut for painting this assignment per group.

assignmentLetter.description: Short label shown in assignment cells.
